decision.archive_summary: Early block about prior implementation details and how to validate it in Codex was resolved. Current active task is adding a direct, continuously updating context-size display triggered from the status bar without manual commands; acceptable display surfaces include an editor, terminal, or tail-like auto-updating view.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn continues the same active topic from t7-t10: they want a built-in, continuously visible context-size display. The earlier validation/testing exchange in t3-t6 and the older implementation summary in t1-t2 are no longer needed for the next turn, so they can leave the raw working set. The user requirements in t7 and t9 are durable and should be pinned semantically even while the active raw block remains focused on the current implementation thread.
